title: Grilled Papaya and Portuguese Sausage Stir Fry
description: A sweet and savory stir fry featuring grilled papaya and spiced Portuguese sausage. Perfect for adventurous eaters!
instructions: 2. Brush papaya with olive oil and season with salt, pepper, and chili flakes.
3. Grill papaya for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
5. Cook Portuguese sausage in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking up with a spoon as it cooks.
6. Add onion and garlic to skillet and cook until onion is translucent.
7. Add chili flakes and stir to combine.
8. Serve grilled papaya wedges with cooked sausage mixture and garnish with chopped cilantro.
10. Optional: Serve with steamed rice or roasted vegetables.
